results.justification: EXACT TWIN — MetaSD multi-drafter speculative decoding framework with dynamic-allocation IS the K-draft hocket-style speculative-decoder mechanism.
EXACT TWIN — parallel drafter scheme for speculative decoding IS the K-draft parallel emission paradigm.
P-EAGLE parallel speculative with MASK-placeholders + position incrementing IS the modulo-K position assignment mechanism.

results.matched_effect_cluster: Parallel token prediction interleaved mask ICLR 2026
results.justification: Parallel multi-token prediction with interleaved-mask tokens covers phase-offset modulo-K paradigm.
Multi-token prediction with parallel candidate generation covers K-token emission paradigm.
Diffusion-inspired speculative decoding covers parallel position-assignment mechanism.
Diffusion-style speculative covers parallel-multi-position decoding paradigm.
Comprehensive analysis of speculative-decoding variants covers parallel + multi-drafter design space.
